hero.title: Custom kitchens and apartment furnishing in Montenegro
hero.description: ARTIDOM makes kitchens, wardrobes and built-in furniture for apartments, villas and rental properties in Montenegro. Production at our workshop in Sutomore, Bar. Measurement and installation across the coast and Podgorica. Typical lead time 3–5 weeks. Selected HoReCa and B2B orders as well.

process.title: How we work
process.step1_text: We discuss your layout, style preferences and budget. You share measurements or we visit the apartment in Bar, Budva or Podgorica.
process.step2_text: Our designer creates 3D renders and technical drawings. You receive a transparent cost estimate with no hidden fees.
process.step3_text: Furniture is manufactured at our 300 m² workshop in Sutomore using CNC cutting and European-grade materials.
process.step4_text: We deliver and install everything on-site across Montenegro. Average lead time is 3–5 weeks from approval.

cta.title: Need a kitchen, wardrobes or a furnishing package?

meta.title: Custom Furniture Workshop in Bar, Montenegro — ARTIDOM
meta.description: ARTIDOM workshop in Sutomore, Bar: CNC cutting, assembly and finishing of custom kitchens, wardrobes and built-in furniture for apartments in Montenegro.

Workshop.intro_fact:
40 craftsmen.
300 sqm workshop.
Production in Bar for apartments and selected B2B interiors.
Workshop.intro_text: ARTIDOM is a custom furniture workshop in Sutomore, Bar, Montenegro. We produce kitchens, wardrobes, TV walls, counters and other interior joinery. CNC cutting, assembly, finishing and packing happen in the same 300 m² facility. We serve apartment owners and selected B2B clients across Montenegro, including Bar, Budva, Tivat and Podgorica.
Workshop.step1_text: Boards, veneer, fittings and stone tops are checked on arrival before they enter production.
Workshop.step2_text: Panels are cut to the project drawings with repeatable tolerances for kitchens, wardrobes and counters.
Workshop.step3_text: Cabinets are assembled, edged and finished in lacquer, veneer or other specified materials.
Workshop.step4_text: Every unit is checked, labelled and prepared for site delivery or export packing.
Workshop.cap2: Apartment packages and single custom units

meta.title: Restaurant and Hotel Furniture in Montenegro
meta.description: Custom restaurant, hotel and service counter joinery from Bar, Montenegro. Selected HoReCa and B2B projects with production, delivery and installation.

horeca.label: HoReCa
horeca.title: Restaurant, hotel and service counter joinery
horeca.description: A secondary direction for ARTIDOM: counters, branded fronts, room furniture and selected public interiors where the brief is already clear and technical.
horeca.pain1: Brand needs custom front-of-house furniture, not off-the-shelf equipment
horeca.sol1: We build counters, fronts and back-of-house joinery to the concept and workflow
horeca.pain2: Openings and launch dates are fixed
horeca.sol2: Production is scheduled against your site programme and handover date
horeca.pain3: One venue includes several furniture types and finishes
horeca.sol3: Counters, wall cladding, shelving and room furniture can come from one workshop
horeca.pain4: The project needs a nearby supplier in Montenegro
horeca.sol4: Our workshop in Bar covers measurement, production, delivery and installation

meta.title: School Furniture and Joinery in Montenegro
meta.description: Custom classroom storage, reception desks and public-zone joinery for schools and campuses in Montenegro, produced in the ARTIDOM workshop in Bar.

education.label: Education
education.title: School storage, reception and public-zone joinery
education.description: We take on education projects when the brief is technical and the schedule is clear: classroom storage, reception areas, staff rooms and public joinery.
education.pain1: Project team needs repeated units in the same finish
education.sol1: Batch production keeps dimensions and finishes consistent across the package
education.pain2: There are public areas, classrooms and staff spaces in one scope
education.sol2: We produce storage, reception and utility joinery from one coordinated spec
education.pain3: Installation must happen inside a fixed opening window
education.sol3: Packing, delivery and installation are prepared to match the programme
education.pain4: Drawings are likely to change during coordination
education.sol4: Because production is local, revisions and measurements are easier to align

meta.title: Custom Workspace Furniture in Montenegro
meta.description: Reception desks, storage and meeting furniture for offices, clinics and public spaces in Montenegro. Produced in Bar with measurement and installation support.

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.title: Reception desks, meeting tables and storage
workspace.description: For offices, clinics and public spaces that need built-in joinery, reception desks or compact workspace furniture made to the layout.
workspace.pain1: Workspace has a non-standard plan and standard furniture wastes area
workspace.sol1: We build reception desks, storage and meeting furniture to the actual layout
workspace.pain2: Client wants one calm finish language across the whole interior
workspace.sol2: Fronts, panels and cabinets are specified together and produced in one run
workspace.pain3: Small public interiors still need durable materials
workspace.sol3: We combine commercial-grade finishes with residential-level detailing
workspace.pain4: Project team needs a workshop that can coordinate directly from drawings
workspace.sol4: We work from DWG, PDF and annotated floor plans with local measurement support

meta.title: Custom Kitchens and Apartment Furnishing in Montenegro
meta.description: Custom kitchens, wardrobes, TV walls and built-in storage for apartments, villas and rental properties in Montenegro. Production in Bar, installation across the coast and Podgorica.

residential.label: Residential
residential.title: Custom kitchens, wardrobes and apartment furnishing
residential.description: We furnish apartments, villas and rental properties in Montenegro: kitchens, wardrobes, entry storage, TV walls and compact built-in solutions. Production at our 300 m² workshop in Sutomore (Bar), measurement and installation across the country. Typical lead time is 3–5 weeks.
residential.image_alt: Apartment kitchen and storage by ARTIDOM
residential.pain1: Apartment needs a kitchen, wardrobes and storage that actually fit
residential.sol1: We build to the real floor plan, not standard module sizes
residential.pain2: Investor or owner wants one workshop for the whole apartment package
residential.sol2: Kitchens, wardrobes, bathroom joinery and wall panels come from one team
residential.pain3: Rental property needs durable materials and a clean look
residential.sol3: We specify finishes that hold up in daily use and short-stay rentals
residential.pain4: Project is on the coast or in Podgorica and needs installation coordination
residential.sol4: Measurement, delivery and installation are coordinated from our Bar workshop
